name: Hassan Ali Mehdi
bio: Visionary founder of Codantrix Labs with deep expertise in AI/ML systems and ground-truth validation methodologies. Hassan focuses on the pragmatic bridge between high-level research and physical-world reliability.

name: Sarah Chen
bio: Specializes in optimizing high-performance computer vision models for low-power edge devices. Sarah ensures that our models run at sub-millisecond speeds on hardware like NVIDIA Jetson and specialized microcontrollers.

name: David Kim
bio: Expert in time-series analysis and predictive modeling for industrial assets. David leads our predictive maintenance and grid optimization initiatives, focusing on measurable ROI for every deployment.

name: James Wilson
bio: Bridges the gap between backend AI pipelines and frontend decision-support tools. James designs the secure, scalable infrastructure that allows our clients to interact with their data in real-time.
